violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Sanitizer spray found at less than 200ppm Quat.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. -Walk in cooler has ambient temperature of 47.8F at bottom front shelf (gallon milk).

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil * was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Water damage in left cabinet below soda machine. -Shelves above dish pit are worn particle board shelves.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Heavy water damage in left cabinet below soda machine. -Shelves above dish pit are worn particle board shelves. -Tong holder at roller grill is hanging loose, nearly detached.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Limescale present of both soda machine ice chutes. -White debris at interior of ice chute if Ice cafe machine.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Case of single use lids on floor in dry storage area. -Sleeves of single use lids in water damaged cabinet - staff stated the lids will be disposed of/are not planned to be used.
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
